title: Flame Grilled Mediterranean Lamb Skewers
description: Buttery and tender lamb skewers flavored with Mediterranean spices and olives, perfect for a meal prep dinner. This dish is prepared on a raclette grill for a unique and delicious experience.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Place the skewers on the preheated raclette grill and cook for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
After 5 minutes of cooking, add the pitted green olives to the grill and cook for an additional 3-5 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional olives and lemon wedges if desired.
